title: Cultivation of Seminavis robusta
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bctbu","text":"This protocol describes how we grew S. robusta and stored cultures at 4 C. Under these condtiions, the cells grow to a maximum density of 2-2.5 x 106 cells/mL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":36,"length":10},{"style":"sup","offset":148,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fust5","text":"The materials used here are described in the media/materials protocol in this collection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up an incubator for 12 hr day-night cycling at 18 C.
Inoculate 100 mL F/2 in 175 cm 2 flask with ~500,000 cells
Mix 5 mL of scraped culture with 5 mL fresh F/2 medium in a 15 mL falcon tube
Wrap with foil and store flat at 4 C.
creator: Lev Tsypin
